problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Homomorphic encryption for private computation is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
